overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character exploring a vibrant post-apocalyptic wetland environment with distinctive red vegetation and ancient ruins. The character traverses shallow water and lily pads before approaching and climbing a smoking stone vent structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow swamp with red ferns and lily pads

events.description: character steps from muddy bank into shallow water
exits shallow water onto dry ground with red ferns

agents.ego_description: walking along the muddy bank and wading through shallow water with lily pads

entered.detail: dense forest of tall trees forming the background
vibrant red ferns covering the ground along the water's edge
clear shallow water with visible stones beneath the surface
clusters of green lily pads floating on the water surface

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a muddy bank covered in red ferns, then steps into a shallow swamp area filled with lily pads. Tall trees line the background while mist hangs in the air, creating a vibrant post-apocalyptic wetland atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: open field covered in dense red ferns with scattered ancient ruins

events.description: ancient ruins and mechanical wreckage become visible in the distance

agents.ego_description: walking through dense red ferns toward ancient ruins and a smoking stone structure

entered.detail: distant stone ruins partially covered by vegetation
large mechanical debris with glowing green accents

segments.scene_description: The character traverses a wide open field densely covered in vibrant red ferns. Ancient ruins and mechanical wreckage appear in the distance as the character approaches a smoking stone vent structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient stone vent structure emitting smoke

events.description: character begins climbing the smoking stone vent structure
camera circles around the vent as character reaches the top

agents.ego_description: climbing the smoking stone vent structure and surveying the area from the top

entered.detail: dilapidated wooden structure with broken planks

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and climbs a tall stone vent structure emitting thick white smoke. The camera circles around the vent as the character ascends, revealing the surrounding red fern field and distant ruins from an elevated perspective.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a vibrant post-apocalyptic wetland that transitions from a misty swamp into an elevated view of a ruined landscape. It begins with the character walking along a muddy bank covered in red ferns before stepping into a shallow swamp filled with lily pads and shrouded in mist. As the character moves forward, the terrain opens into a wide field of dense red vegetation where ancient ruins and mechanical wreckage emerge in the distance. The scene then shifts focus toward a smoking stone vent structure, which the character approaches and begins to climb. Finally, the camera circles the ascending character, revealing the expansive red fern fields and distant ruins from a high vantage point as thick white smoke billows from the vent.
